description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements, testing the ability to differentiate and correctly use tags beyond basic <div> and <span>. It is positioned as a moderate‑difficulty challenge with a light‑hearted, motivational tone that encourages learners to improve their markup skills. The content is aimed at developers who want to validate and deepen their HTML5 expertise.
Topics: HTML5 semantic tags, Proper use of <header>, <nav>, <section>, <article>, <footer>, etc., Accessibility considerations, Best practices for structured markup
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone with basic HTML experience seeking to advance their semantic HTML proficiency.
